tasks.title: Implement authentication flow
tasks.description: Set up JWT-based auth with refresh token support and secure storage. Handle auto-login on restart and 401 redirect.

tasks.title: Build task list UI
tasks.description: Create the main task list screen with filtering (status, priority) and title search. Use shimmer loading and empty state illustration.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for providers
tasks.description: Cover all Riverpod providers and repository implementations with unit tests. Target 80%+ coverage.

tasks.title: Setup CI/CD pipeline
tasks.description: Configure GitHub Actions for automated testing, building, and deployment. Include lint checks and test reporting.

tasks.title: Performance optimization
tasks.description: Profile and optimize the app for 60fps scroll performance and reduced memory usage. Use DevTools to identify bottlenecks.

tasks.title: فكرني اشرب ميه
tasks.description: اشرب ميه عدد 3 لتر في اليو
